AT0079.title: Wallet Phishing and Drainer Tools
AT0079.description: Phishing and authorization-drainer tools targeting crypto wallet users. They commonly impersonate airdrops, NFT mints, DApp logins, transaction confirmations, or EIP authorization pages to trick users into revealing seed phrases, private keys, or signing malicious approvals. Advanced kits combine Telegram bots, fake wallet extensions, clipboard hijacking, malicious DApp frontends, and on-chain monitoring to automatically transfer authorized assets.

references.title: Wallet drainers and approval phishing overview
